## Summary

What changed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Prompt update
- [ ] Rule update
- [ ] Skill/agent update
- [ ] Script update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No private source code included
- [ ] No generated mirror docs from private projects included
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, keys, or credentials included
- [ ] `src/` contains only placeholder/template files
- [ ] Generated output folders contain only `.gitkeep`
- [ ] README/HOW_TO references still match prompt filenames
- [ ] Status values use only `[ ]`, `[~]`, `[x]`, `[D]`, and `[!]`

## Testing

How did you test this change?
